channel.title: GitHub Unknown languages Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Unknown languages in GitHub

item.title: PatrickJS/awesome-cursorrules
item.description: 📄 A curated list of awesome .cursorrules files

item.title: skills/introduction-to-github
item.description: Get started using GitHub in less than an hour.

item.title: ByteByteGoHq/system-design-101
item.description: Explain complex systems using visuals and simple terms. Help you prepare for system design interviews.

item.title: mtdvio/every-programmer-should-know
item.description: A collection of (mostly) technical things every software developer should know about

item.title: ruanyf/weekly
item.description: 科技爱好者周刊，每周五发布

item.title: 0voice/expert_readed_books
item.description: 2021年最新总结，推荐工程师合适读本，计算机科学，软件技术，创业，思想类，数学类，人物传记书籍

item.title: 0x90n/InfoSec-Black-Friday
item.description: All the deals for InfoSec related software/tools this Black Friday

item.title: sindresorhus/awesome
item.description: 😎 Awesome lists about all kinds of interesting topics

item.title: n8n-io/self-hosted-ai-starter-kit
item.description: The Self-hosted AI Starter Kit is an open-source template that quickly sets up a local AI environment. Curated by n8n, it provides essential tools for creating secure, self-hosted AI workflows.

item.title: justjavac/free-programming-books-zh_CN
item.description: 📚 免费的计算机编程类中文书籍，欢迎投稿

item.title: binhnguyennus/awesome-scalability
item.description: The Patterns of Scalable, Reliable, and Performant Large-Scale Systems
